title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Dobbs Ferry, NY | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Dobbs Ferry, NY. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Bats in your Dobbs Ferry home or business require immediate professional attention. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Dobbs Ferry and Westchester County, ensuring safe, humane removal and permanent prevention. Our certified technicians use proven methods to protect your property and family from bat infestations.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Dobbs Ferry residents, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with state-of-the-art bat exclusion techniques. We're fully licensed, insured, and committed to providing effective, humane solutions that comply with all New York wildlife protection regulations.
localContext: Dobbs Ferry's historic homes along the Hudson River and tree-lined neighborhoods near Springhurst and Juhring Nature Preserve create ideal conditions for bat colonies seeking attic spaces and rooflines. The village's beautiful Victorian and Colonial-era architecture, while charming, often features the eaves, chimneys, and ventilation gaps that attract bats seeking shelter.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Dobbs Ferry?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Dobbs Ferry typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, entry point locations, and the extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Dobbs Ferry safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New York State guidelines for humane bat exclusion. We never trap or harm bats; instead, we use one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave safely while preventing re-entry. All work is done outside of maternity season to protect bat pups.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my Dobbs Ferry home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, dark staining around entry points, bat droppings (guano) in attics or near walls, and seeing bats entering or exiting your home at twilight. You may also notice a musty ammonia-like odor from accumulated guano.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bats from my Dobbs Ferry property?
faqs.answer: We can typically schedule an inspection within 24-48 hours. The exclusion process usually takes 1-3 days for installation, followed by a monitoring period of 3-7 days to ensure all bats have left. Complete sealing and cleanup can be finished within 1-2 weeks depending on the scope of work.
